title: Long-run scenario and benchmark consolidation
summary: Consolidate M6 headless, Worker, Web and Windows evidence with M5 invariant and benchmark protection before product verdict.
acceptance: M6 consolidates headless, Worker, Web and Windows evidence
Runs M5 alpha content long-run and M6 product-gate checks without M0-M5 regression
Records performance, memory, loading, save/import/export and diagnostic evidence needed for product-gate verdict
M5 final world/read-model hashes 0xfba70a5c / 0x9ba83cb7 remain protected unless reviewed migration changes them

history.details: Instantiated from reviewed WM-0084 M6 DAG; keep proposed until all prerequisite product-gate slices are done.

objective: Produce the consolidated M6 regression, benchmark and long-run evidence required before product-gate decision.
risksAndFileOwnership: Risk: product-gate results legitimately change hashes and require reviewed migration evidence.
Risk: QA consolidation becomes product repair instead of evidence.
File ownership is limited to benchmarks, headless runner diagnostics and observability docs.
m0M5RegressionCoverage: M5 final world/read-model hashes 0xfba70a5c / 0x9ba83cb7 remain protected
M0-M4 regression evidence from M5 closeout remains intact
benchmarkImpact: May add M6 consolidation artifacts and baseline evidence; existing 10 percent warning / 20 percent blocking policy remains unchanged.
reviewRouting: qa-performance completes to reviewer; reviewer verifies benchmark, hash and artifact evidence.
rollbackModel: Revert consolidation tooling/artifacts if product gate evidence is invalid; leave M6 decision blocked.

sparkEligibility.reason: Long-run and benchmark consolidation owns product-gate evidence and cannot use Spark.
